name: Jacob Lawrence
desc: An informational resource for the artist Jacob Lawrence, built on WordPress with a custom photo-gallery plugin. A rewarding deep dive into the lives of the artists, tying Lawrence's art into the content so the site feels like an art piece itself. A collaboration with Montana Banana.

name: Progress Virginia Education Fund
desc: A Virginia nonprofit, designed and shipped on WordPress within a three-day turnaround due to a tight timeline.

name: Advocate Accounting
desc: A modernized, accessible redesign with an integrated shopping cart and training portal powered by Stripe.

name: Progress Alliance
desc: A comprehensive technical security assessment — stakeholder interviews, penetration testing, and a detailed report with actionable remediation steps.

name: WCA Data Hub Portal
desc: A custom data hub for Washington Community Alliance partners to submit support requests. Uses WordPress for registration and membership, backed by a custom MySQL database and Google Drive integrations.

name: Sit N Stay
desc: A full-service petcare company in Burien, Washington. Features playful hover interactions, paw-print call-to-action elements, and a responsive color mosaic on the services page. A collaboration with Montana Banana.
